falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically saw shallow dips with 4950 as structural support; a clean break invalidates the consolidation/bottoming thesis and suggests a deeper corrective phase rather than pattern completion

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 28 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The referenced bottom pattern featured VIX compression into the low-20s as fear receded; sustained VIX elevation above 28 indicates regime shift to risk-off, contradicting the 79% pattern match which requires vol normalization

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.85% while SPX is below 5100
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This specific combination of flight-to-quality bid in bonds with weak equity response signals growth scare rather than soft landing; the bottom_2024_aug pattern required yields stable/rising with equities recovering, so this divergence kills the macro reconciliation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
